# Expected Hidden Assumptions: Namba AI Upgrade

- "More alive" means interaction quality, not anthropomorphic claims or
  autonomous behavior.
- Better memory can be added without changing privacy, consent, or deletion
  policies.
- Daily work spans a known set of projects, tools, and routines.
- "Without being bossy" can be expressed as interaction rules or escalation
  boundaries.
- A real step forward can be evaluated without baseline experience metrics.
- Existing Namba AI architecture can support the requested upgrade.
